title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology breaks down six security risks associated with autonomous AI agents and the OpenClaw project, including prompt injection and credential exposure. The video examines how agent autonomy, tool access, and memory mechanisms create real-world vulnerabilities in agentic AI systems.
